name: Valid admin login navigates to dashboard
description:
As a user
  I want to login to OrangeHRM
  So that I can access the HR system
descriptionHtml:
As a user
I want to login to OrangeHRM
So that I can access the HR system

testStage.description:
As a user
  I want to login to OrangeHRM
  So that I can access the HR system

steps.name: Given I am on the OrangeHRM login page
When I enter username "Admin" and password "admin123"
Then I should be redirected to the dashboard
